package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerLoggingOverheadLoggerWithFieldsPerRequest() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_logging_overhead_logger_with_fields_per_request"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Logging overhead. Flag derived logger construction per request when stable fields can be attached once."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
